title: Arkanix Stealer: a C++ & Python infostealer

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Arkanix Stealer: a C++ & Python infostealer
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/07
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*hvnc.py*'
            - '*stealer.py*'
            - '*utils.cpp*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
